name: Seonad
qualifications: Available for direct booking via reception. Our mental health nurses provide assessment and support for patients experiencing mental health difficulties.

name: Andrew
qualifications: Available for direct booking via reception.

name: Practice Pharmacy Team
qualifications: Our pharmacy team manages medication reviews, prescribing support, and medication queries. You may be asked to speak with a pharmacist as part of your care.

name: Reception and Administration Team
qualifications: Our friendly admin team are your first point of contact. They are trained to help direct you to the right care and can assist with appointments, prescriptions, and general queries.
